final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing full-screen mobile advertisement screenshot for a flagship smartphone launch campaign.

Style/medium: needs a high-impact brand-reveal aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be full-screen vertical layout, immersive edge-to-edge composition
Subject: must include a premium flagship smartphone as hero product
Scene/backdrop: needs a dramatic, visually striking backdrop — exact scene treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a high visual-impact atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bold, brand-forward direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a premium, glossy-tech surface treatment — exact grain / sheen is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "OPPO Find X9 Pro" (large, primary hero text), "OPPO" (wordmark/logo lockup)
Constraints: must be 1080×1920 portrait format; brand-exposure priority with maximum visual impact
Avoid:
